nodes.snippet:
function intro(state: State): void {
  note(
    state.footer,
    [
      "Demo slash commands enabled for interactive mode.",
      `- /permission [kind] (${PERMISSIONS.join(", ")})`,
      `- /question [kind] (${QUESTIONS.join(", ")})`,
      `- /fmt <kind> (${KINDS.join(", ")})`,
      "Examples:",
      "- /permission bash",
      "- /question custom",
      "- /fmt markdown",
      "- /fmt table",
      "- /fmt text your custom text",
    ].join("\n"),
  )
}
